strings.plugin/ffmpeg.video.transcoder/descripti: Transcode videos using FFmpeg (CRF + HW acceleration).
strings.plugin/ffmpeg.video.transcoder/field/crf: Lower is better quality and larger file. Typical: 18-28 (CPU/x264). For GPU encoders, CRF is mapped to the closest quality parameter.
strings.plugin/ffmpeg.video.transcoder/field/hw/: Select encoder backend. Requires matching GPU and FFmpeg build with the encoder enabled.
